company_name: Korea Commercial Act treasury cancellation reform
notes: Commercial Act reform is a strong Stage 1 value-up background, but individual Green still needs cancellation, ROE, and FCF.

company_name: SK Square buyback cancellation and governance execution
notes: NAV discount plus cancellation and independent-director evidence makes this an execution candidate, not policy-only value-up.

company_name: Samsung Electronics treasury-share cancellation mixed case
notes: Cancellation improves capital allocation quality, but negative price reaction and business risks keep this from Green.
Round 164 keeps banks and financial holdings Green-capable only after ROE, CET1, credit cost, PF exposure, and return execution are verified.
Round 164 keeps insurance Green-capable, but separates CSM quality, K-ICS, loss ratio, and investment-loss risks from bank value-up.
Year-level timing and near-10% price reaction are given, so no exact stage date is invented.

company_name: Korea Zinc tender offer event premium
notes: Tender-offer price reaction is event premium first; it must not be misclassified as structural value-up.
Share issuance after a tender battle is a governance and capital-structure RedTeam event.
Tax-policy relief can help sentiment, but transaction-tax, dividend-tax, and future threshold uncertainty remain R6 RedTeam overlays.

company_name: AI windfall / citizen dividend policy-comment shock
notes: AI windfall or citizen-dividend policy comments can damage crowded value-up and brokerage price paths even before tax law changes.
Large user base is useful, but take rate, attach, credit loss, security, and FCF remain required.

company_name: Clear Street fintech IPO valuation compression
notes: A fintech IPO plan is not Green; size cuts, valuation cuts, crypto exposure, and investor caution are RedTeam-first.

company_name: Toss global expansion and won stablecoin watch
notes: Toss fintech is a success candidate, while won stablecoin remains Watch before regulation, volume, reserve, and fees.
Circle is a regulated stablecoin infrastructure reference, but post-IPO valuation requires 4B-watch.

company_name: Bank of England stablecoin rules reconsideration
notes: Regulated stablecoin exposure still needs reserve, redemption, issuer economics, and regulatory proof.
The document gives a 2022~2025 range, so no exact stage date is invented.

company_name: Hana Bank Dunamu / Upbit equity-stake watch
notes: A bank exchange stake is strategic Stage 1/2 evidence; Green waits for equity-method income, collaboration revenue, regulation, and security stability.
A Dunamu-Naver Financial share-swap option is Stage 1/2 until approvals, fee revenue, platform cross-sell, and security stability are verified.

company_name: Digital asset exchange security and cycle break reference
notes: Exchange exposure must keep security, regulatory, and crypto-cycle failure paths separate from strategic stake narratives.
PF delinquency and reserve burden are sector-level hard gates for bank, insurance, and securities value-up.
Exchange market share and fee revenue must be capped when wallet compromise, compensation cost, regulation, or trust damage appears.
